reviews.comment:
Buen Motel para pasar la noche. Limpio, algo ruidoso por estar en la ruta. Camas comodas, wifi pobre. Servicio de restaurant bueno. Varias opciones de pago.

(Translated by Google)
Good motel for an overnight stay. Clean, a bit noisy due to its location on the highway. Comfortable beds, poor Wi-Fi. Good restaurant service. Several payment options.
